narratives.name: AI Infrastructure Buildout
narratives.thesis: Massive capital expenditure from hyperscalers continues to drive demand for high-end AI chips and memory.
watchFor: Nvidia earnings miss on data center guidance
China export controls expand to HBM

narratives.name: GLP-1 Obesity Wave
narratives.thesis: The massive expansion of the obesity drug market continues to be a dominant healthcare tailwind.

narratives.name: Gold
narratives.thesis: Gold remains a primary hedge against geopolitical instability and persistent inflation.

narratives.name: Agentic AI Integration
narratives.thesis: Enterprise software is shifting toward autonomous agents, creating a new growth cycle for established platforms.
watchFor: AI ROI concerns from major customers

narratives.name: Cybersecurity Expansion
narratives.thesis: Consolidation and the increasing complexity of AI-driven threats are driving a wave of platform upgrades.

narratives.name: Digital Ad & Content Dominance
narratives.thesis: Major platforms are leveraging AI to optimize ad targeting and content engagement, driving revenue.
watchFor: Regulatory action on social media algorithms

narratives.name: Yield-Driven Valuation Pressure
narratives.thesis: Hot CPI and PPI prints are keeping yields elevated, compressing multiples for high-growth software names.

narratives.name: Banks - Diversified
narratives.thesis: Diversified banking leaders are benefiting from strong dividends and stable net interest margins.

narratives.name: Consumer Value Rotation
narratives.thesis: Consumers are increasingly prioritizing value, benefiting large-scale discount retailers.

narratives.name: Credit Services
narratives.thesis: Global payment networks continue to benefit from resilient consumer spending and cross-border activity.

narratives.name: Internet Retail Volatility
narratives.thesis: Mixed consumer sentiment and varying growth rates are creating significant price swings in e-commerce leaders.
watchFor: Consumer spending data falls below expectations

narratives.name: Healthcare Plan Scrutiny
narratives.thesis: Rising medical loss ratios and regulatory uncertainty are pressuring managed care providers.

narratives.name: Aerospace Safety & Delivery Woes
narratives.thesis: Ongoing delivery delays and regulatory scrutiny continue to weigh on major aerospace manufacturers.

narratives.name: Silver
narratives.thesis: Silver is benefiting from both its role as a macro hedge and its industrial demand in clean energy.

Technology.thesis: AI infrastructure demand remains the primary driver, but hot inflation and rising yields are pressuring software valuations.
watchFor: Nvidia earnings miss on data center guidance
Mag 7 capex guide DOWN at next earnings

Consumer Cyclical.thesis: Internet retail is experiencing high volatility as consumers balance spending, while broader discretionary remains bifurcated.

Communication Services.thesis: AI-driven advertising efficiency and content dominance are fueling growth for major digital platforms.

Industrials.thesis: Geopolitical tensions support defense interest, but aerospace faces ongoing delivery and safety hurdles.

Healthcare.thesis: GLP-1 drugs are driving massive growth, but healthcare plans face pressure from rising medical costs.

Financials.thesis: Large-cap banks are showing resilience and benefit from a higher-for-longer interest rate environment.
watchFor: Fed pivot to aggressive rate cuts

Consumer Defensive.thesis: Inflationary pressures are driving a rotation into value-oriented discount retailers.

Precious Metals.thesis: Geopolitical uncertainty and inflation concerns are driving demand for gold and silver as hedges.
